parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_briefings (
  id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  summary_md TEXT NOT NULL,
  actions JSON NOT NULL,
  raw_response MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
  dismissed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_briefings (
  id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  summary_md TEXT NOT NULL,
  actions JSON NOT NULL,
  raw_response MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
  dismissed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
SELECT date, summary_md, actions, dismissed_at, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(created_at) AS created_at_unix FROM ai_briefings ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT action_id, args_hash, decision, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(decided_at) AS decided_at_unix FROM ai_action_decisions WHERE decided_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY ORDER BY decided_at DESC
UPDATE ai_briefings SET dismissed_at = NOW() WHERE date = CURDATE() AND dismissed_at IS NULL
